verse_text: Then the one whose name was Cleopas answered and said to Him, 'Are You the only stranger in Jerusalem, and have You not known the things which happened there in these days?'

pericope.title: The Women Find the Tomb Empty

links.context: This other disciple is John, the author of this Gospel. It was a common practice for an author to conceal his name in the details of his story (see 13:23; compare [[MRK.14:51]], [[MRK.14:52]]; [[LUK.24:13]], [[LUK.24:18]]).
